title: cyclobalanopsis hunanensis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis hunanensis, also known as the Hunan oak or Chinese oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae, native to the mountains of southern China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis hunanensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams.
